error_summary: ax-engine rejected the local artifact as an unsanitized Qwen3-Next checkpoint.
error_detail: weight loading failed: unsanitized checkpoint detected: linear_attention norm mean absolute value is 0.0113 (expected ~1.0 for sanitized mlx-community weights). This checkpoint appears to store norm weights as zero-centered deltas, a raw HuggingFace format that ax-engine does not transform on load.
remediation: Convert with mlx_lm.convert --hf-path <org/model> --mlx-path <dest> -q --q-bits 4, or use a pre-sanitized mlx-community artifact before publishing fresh AX rows.
